heading: Nonapplicability to Saint Lawrence Seaway
label: 2234 Nonapplicability to Saint Lawrence Seaway
text: Sections 2231, 2232, and 2233 of this title do not apply to any harbor or inland harbor project for that portion of the Saint Lawrence Seaway administered by the Great Lakes St. Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation.
notes: Amendments2020— substituted “Great Lakes St. Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation” for “Saint Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation”.Pub. L. 116–260
amendments: Amendments2020— substituted “Great Lakes St. Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation” for “Saint Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation”.Pub. L. 116–260
